S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said I 1940 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Oman anini i ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, patirengan a romi'ad i 1970 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 23 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: *ab~b~vo~uo~us b~b~vin sai…¨~…ģ a…ĺ sai…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i *ab~b~vo~uo~us b~b~vin sai…¨~…ģ a…ĺ sai…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~uman anini i ¶i *ab~b~vo~uo~us b~b~vin sai…¨~…ģ a…ĺ sai…¨~…ģ, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Qaboos bin Said al Said I 1940 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 18 a romi'ad masofoc ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Oman anini i ci Qaboos bin Said al Said, patirengan a romi'ad i 1970 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 23 a romi'ad.
